name: autopilot-loop
description: Reusable agent loop for turning scratchwork ideas into iterated, judged implementation work.

interface.shortDescription: Iterate from scratchwork until meaningful work is exhausted.
interface.longDescription: Autopilot Loop packages a reusable Codex skill, state templates, scoring rubrics, and CLI helpers for repeatedly asking what should happen next, implementing the highest-value next task, verifying it, and stopping when an independent judge says further work is not meaningful.
defaultPrompt: Loop on this app until nothing meaningful remains.
